/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-unused-macros -Wlogical-op -Wmissing-declarations -Wsign-conversion -pedantic -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -Wctor-dtor-privacy -Winit-self -Wformat=2 -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wold-style-cast -Woverloaded-virtual -Wredundant-decls -Wshadow -Wsign-promo -Wstrict-null-sentinel -Wstrict-overflow=5 -Wno-cast-function-type -Wno-sign-conversion -Wnoexcept CMakeFiles/test_unchecked.dir/test_unchecked.cpp.o -o test_unchecked  libtest_main.a ../src/libluabind09.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblua5.1.so -lm -lm -ldl
